strategy.name: Candle Pattern Scalping — Engulfing + Pin Bar
strategy.description: Simple price-action scalping. The trigger is a candlestick reversal pattern (engulfing or pin bar), but it only fires when the pattern agrees with the trend and session bias. Pattern = timing, EMA(21) + VWAP = context. No pattern is traded blindly.

indicators.ema_21: Trend direction on the entry timeframe. Price above EMA(21) = uptrend, only look for longs. Below = downtrend, only look for shorts.
indicators.vwap: Session bias. Price above VWAP = buyers in control. Below = sellers. Resets at midnight UTC. Patterns are only taken in the direction of VWAP.
indicators.volume: Confirmation. The pattern candle's volume should be at or above the 20-candle average — a real pattern comes with participation, not on a dead bar.
indicators.candle_pattern: The entry trigger, read from raw OHLC. Bullish/bearish engulfing (current body fully engulfs the prior body) or pin bar/hammer/shooting star (small body, long rejection wick at least 2x the body).

neutral: Price is oscillating across VWAP and EMA(21) with no clear side — stand aside

long: Trend is up — price is above EMA(21)
Session bias is up — price is above VWAP

A bullish reversal pattern just closed: bullish engulfing (green candle whose body fully engulfs the prior red body) OR a hammer / bullish pin bar (lower wick at least 2x the body, small body near the top of the range)
The pattern candle's volume is at or above the 20-candle average volume
short: Trend is down — price is below EMA(21)
Session bias is down — price is below VWAP

A bearish reversal pattern just closed: bearish engulfing (red candle whose body fully engulfs the prior green body) OR a shooting star / bearish pin bar (upper wick at least 2x the body, small body near the bottom of the range)
The pattern candle's volume is at or above the 20-candle average volume

exit_rules: Hard stop for longs: just below the low of the pattern candle (the wick that got rejected)
Hard stop for shorts: just above the high of the pattern candle
Take profit at a fixed 1.5x the stop distance (1.5R) — scalps are taken quickly, not held for a swing
Time stop: if the trade has not hit target or stop within 12 candles, close it — the setup has gone stale
Exit early if price closes back through EMA(21) against the position
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade — position size is derived from the stop distance, not a fixed lot
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
No trade if price is more than 1.5% away from VWAP — overextended, the snap-back is already gone
No trade against the EMA(21) trend, ever — a pattern alone is not a signal
Skip patterns with a tiny range (body + wicks smaller than the recent average candle) — not enough conviction to scalp
Paper trade first — validate on your specific asset and timeframe before going live
notes: Candle-pattern scalping — designed for 1m to 5m timeframes, tuned here for 5m where patterns are cleaner than on 1m. The pattern is only the trigger; EMA(21) trend and VWAP bias are the filters that keep you from trading noise. Do not apply to higher timeframes without re-tuning the stop and target.
